item.description: ### Added - **Reset times on every usage window.** Each limit — 5-hour, weekly, and per-model — now shows when it resets. Click any reset to switch the whole app between a countdown ("·4h") and the exact clock time ("·2:40 PM" / "·Jul 24"); hover to see the other form. - **Lines changed per session (Claude).** Each Claude session row now shows how many lines it has added and removed (e.g. "+28,411 −5,354"), right from Claude Code's own count.
